programmes.show_description: Breathe For Me Mom. Cheri and Brian dote on their only child, Scott, and his kids. The close-knit family thrives until a shocking betrayal tears them apart. S9, Ep1
It's Over. Move On. Popular and outgoing, Rowena aspires to be a teen psychologist. But her dreams turn into a nightmare when a pathological love connection shatters everything. S8, Ep4
The Tragedy On Tennessee 14. When a Tennessee State Trooper is murdered on a highway, police turn to his dashcam for answers. It takes more surveillance video to find the killer. S8, Ep3
Final Offer. A single mum leaves for work one morning and never returns. Police analyse a sinister trail of security camera footage, hoping to find her. S8, Ep4

False Witness. How advances in technology can expose a murderous liar, such as the man who staged his wife's suicide to cash in a $100,000 life insurance policy. S5, Ep1
Missing. Investigating America's 1.8 million missing people; some of whom are runaways who find their way home, whilst others simply disappear. S5, Ep3
The Price of Greed. Follows the FBI investigation into a robbery in which masked gunmen tied up employees at an armoured truck depot and left with $18.9 million. S5, Ep1
Caught in the Act. Follows FBI investigations into similar armed robberies across the US in which several people were killed by two male suspects. S5, Ep2
Tracie Andrews & Mike Gifford-Hull. What exposed Tracie Andrews' lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hull's TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth. S2, Ep2
Partners in Crime. Investigates partners who commit crimes, including two cab drivers, and a new DNA technique that can extract clues from four-year-old evidence. S4, Ep2
Tainted Trust. Three cases illustrate how poison, including arsenic and potassium chloride, can be used as a murder weapon. S4, Ep5
Till Death Do Us Part. An examination of what happens when lovers turn on each other, and ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce. S4, Ep7
Disappearance In The Desert. Daniel Robinson arrives at his work site in the Arizona desert. A co-worker claims he was acting strangely before leaving in the middle of his shift. S10, Ep3
Vanished In The Night. 26-year-old Kirsten Breuggeman mysteriously vanished from view on a CCTV camera one night in 2021. It is the last known sighting of Kirsten. S10, Ep5
A Vanishing On The Border. When Kimberly Avila, a trans Latina woman, fails to return after a night out in Texas, her family fears she was taken or killed by a cartel member. S10, Ep4
New Mom Missing. Successful lawyer and new mum Ciera Breland disappears after she and her husband visit his mother in Georgia. It emerges her perfect life isn't what it seems. S10, Ep8
The Sweetest Man In The World. The search for a missing bus driver reveals a complicated love triangle. It leaves investigators with more questions than answers. S10, Ep7
Golden State Bridge. On September 20th, 2020, 19-year-old Sydney West decided to visit the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco and mysteriously vanished into the fog. S11, Ep1
I Will Kill. Amber vanishes on Friday the 13th. A year later, Chelsea disappears. A survivor links the cases as police race to stop a hidden predator. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: Pathologically Evil. After four women vanish and their cases go cold for decades, Texas Ranger Jim Holland must bond with a serial killer to pry loose the truth. S1, Ep1
Brothers And Sisters. Cindy Monkman is looking for something serious and Michael Apelt seems to be her perfect match, until their first Christmas together turns into a horror story. S8, Ep5
The Only Way Out. Roger Harris and his wife Donna built their dream home in Florida, but just after the birth of their second son, a vile secret threatens their sweet, simple life. S8, Ep6
Making A Killing. A woman is found dead outside her office. Surveillance footage leads detectives to a closet full of dirty secrets that may be worth killing over. S8, Ep5
One Last Ride. In Miami, a young couple is shot when a failed robbery at a gas station goes wrong. Detectives must rely on the grainy gas station video for clues. S8, Ep6

A Federal Offence. This edition of Forensic Detectives follows the work of investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms. S4, Ep12
Invisible Death. Discover how toxicologists look for clues in blood and tissue to bring murders to light, including the case of a wife poisoned by cyanide. S5, Ep7
Home Invaders. A convicted bank robber and his partner in crime escape on their way to court and go on to make the biggest bank robbery in Wisconsin history. S5, Ep5
Lawless. When police officers respond to a domestic disturbance, a fleeing suspect fires at them. Fingerprints and an FBI investigation lead to the criminal. S5, Ep7
Ian Stewart. Bestselling author, Helen Bailey, was a wealthy widow. After finding love again with Ian Stewart she vanished. He helps in the search - but was it a cover-up? S2, Ep6
The Initiation. When a record store clerk is shot and killed outside a bank, surprising clues left at the scene indicate that robbery was not the motive. S5, Ep10
Domestic Terror. Specialised FBI teams root out and dismantle terrorist operations and put away criminals whose secretive cells are well armed and very dangerous. S5, Ep12
Fatal Friendship. When a land developer finds his wife missing, the FBI suspects him of the kidnapping but they must keep their options open. S5, Ep13

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Goodbye Horses. On Chincoteague Island, a young mother is murdered steps from a vacant summer home. Det. Danny Plott learns she was lured to her death by a mysterious phone call. S1, Ep5

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Radio Silence. The body of a promising young radio host turns up near a road in south Houston. Det. Harris takes the case, and uncovers a tragic tale of love and deceit. S2, Ep5

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Drugstore Cowboy. To solve the murder of a respected young entrepreneur, Detective Dale Mason must navigate a tangled conspiracy and outwit a band of career criminals. S2, Ep3

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: A former mayor of an Ohio town turns up dead in his hunting cabin. Detective Ryan Allar explores whether this is political retaliation or something more personal. S2, Ep1

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: The Creek. A home health care aide's body floats in a rural Connecticut creek. Detective Garritt Kelly joins the investigation to bring justice to a community gripped by fear. S2, Ep6

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: What She Saw. When a couple are killed in their bedroom in a Maryland town, Det. Joe Bellino wonders if the answer lies with their daughter, who bore witness to both murders. S1, Ep6
Trimaan Dhillon. When Alice Ruggles is found dead in her flat, detectives uncover a tale of obsession. Police must distinguish truth from lies to solve this case. S5, Ep9
The Granny Killer. A young mother finally escapes her violent husband, unaware he'll soon be arrested after a deadly killing spree targeting elderly women. S10, Ep20
A Disgrace To The Uniform. Russell Williams led a shocking double life as a rapist and murderer. How did he give himself away as one of Canada's most dangerous criminals? S7, Ep5
